_description: IntLLM Base training gate result (c.1 Chinchilla-optimal 982M tokens). Supersedes c.2 (see _superseded_by).

_supersedes.reason: c.2 was 0.5x Chinchilla (half-trained); c.1 doubles tokens to Chinchilla-optimal 20 tok/param for production-grade margin

training.notes: First attempt (18h03m-started that same day from 2026-04-22 08:31) hung at step 8600 due to laptop sleep-event stale HF CDN sockets (see memory/feedback_hf_streaming_hang.md). Was killed 18:44 and relaunched fresh. This trace is the relaunch that completed cleanly.

gate._margin_note: Margin 0.21 nat = ~3x larger than c.2's 0.07 nat margin. Production-grade: robust to eval variance, reviewer-defensible for paper Table 2 Base row.
